sync_note: Run on the Hermes production host; dry-run by default, INSTALL=1 to apply.
description: Hermes cron for Groover's Moltbook add-on (optional per project). Core engage pipeline is engage-core.ts; registry MCP is packages/marketplace.

env.MOLTBOOK_API_KEY: required for Moltbook add-on jobs only
env.SKIP_REPERTOIRE_INGEST: optional — set 1 to disable post-tick auto-ingest

jobs.description: Governed replies on own posts via engage-core
Governed replies on others' posts via engage-core
Mechanism-focused daily posts via engage-core post pipeline
